title: rubus × oenodermis
intro: Rubus × oenodermis, also known as the hybrid raspberry or wild raspberry, is a hybrid plant species resulting from the cross between the American red raspberry (Rubus idaeus) and the black raspberry (Rubus occidentalis). The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its high anthocyanin content, which has antioxidant and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Rubus × oenodermis include reducing inflammation and improving cardiovascular health, as well as exhibiting potential anti-cancer properties. Herbal preparations of Rubus × oenodermis can be made into teas, tinctures, or jams, and are often used to support immune function and overall well-being.
